payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a raised central panel and rectangular framed trim, smooth slightly glossy surface and visible wood grain; mostly visible in crop but top and bottom are slightly edge-cropped — estimated distance ~1.0 m from camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"tall dark wood cabinet door","long_description":"Tall dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a raised central panel and rectangular framed trim, smooth slightly glossy surface and visible wood grain; mostly visible in crop but top and bottom are slightly edge-cropped — estimated distance ~1.0 m from camera.","attributes":["dark brown stain","wood grain visible","raised central panel","rectangular framed trim","smooth glossy finish","vertical orientation","top and bottom edge-cropped","no visible handle/knob"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.0}
